glosses.ja: パンフレット; 小冊子

translations.en: I'm taking the brochure with me.
translations.vi: Tôi mang theo tờ giới thiệu.
translations.hi: मैं ब्रॉशर साथ ले जा रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: パンフレットを持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular; main predicate; part of the separable verb ‘mitnehmen’ with particle at clause end.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of ‘nehme’.
Separable verb particle combining with ‘nehmen’ to form ‘mitnehmen’; placed in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Die Broschüre liegt auf dem Tresen.

translations.de: Die Broschüre liegt auf dem Tresen.
translations.en: The brochure is lying on the counter.
translations.es: El folleto está sobre el mostrador.
translations.fr: Le dépliant est sur le comptoir.
translations.pt: O folheto está em cima do balcão.
translations.vi: Tờ giới thiệu nằm trên quầy.
translations.nl: De folder ligt op de toonbank.
translations.el: Το φυλλάδιο είναι πάνω στον πάγκο.
translations.ja: パンフレットがカウンターの上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of ‘liegt’.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive, indicating static location.
Preposition governing dative for location; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular dative; determiner within the PP after ‘auf’.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (location).

sentences.target: Meine Mutter sucht eine Broschüre über Reisen.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ zuːxt ˈaɪ̯nə bʁoˈʃyːʁə ˈyːbɐ ˈʁaɪ̯zən/

translations.de: Meine Mutter sucht eine Broschüre über Reisen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ zuːxt ˈaɪ̯nə bʁoˈʃyːʁə ˈyːbɐ ˈʁaɪ̯zən/
translations.en: My mother is looking for a brochure about travel.
translations.es: Mi madre busca un folleto de viajes.
translations.fr: Ma mère cherche un dépliant sur les voyages.
translations.it: Mia madre sta cercando un opuscolo di viaggio.
translations.ko: 우리 엄마는 여행 브로셔를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妈妈在找旅游宣传册。
translations.yue: 我媽喺度搵旅遊小冊子。
translations.ru: Моя мама ищет буклет о путешествиях.
translations.pt: Minha mãe está procurando um folheto de viagens.
translations.he: אמא שלי מחפשת חוברת על טיולים.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi đang tìm một tờ giới thiệu về du lịch.
translations.ar: أمي تبحث عن كتيب عن السفر.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder zoekt een folder over reizen.
translations.uk: Моя мама шукає буклет про подорожі.
translations.hi: मेरी माँ यात्रा के बारे में एक ब्रॉशर ढूँढ रही हैं.
translations.pl: Moja mama szuka broszury o podróżach.
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου ψάχνει ένα φυλλάδιο για ταξίδια.
translations.nb: Moren min leter etter en brosjyre om reiser.
translations.id: Ibu saya sedang mencari brosur wisata.
translations.sv: Min mamma letar efter en resebroschyr.
translations.ro: Mama mea caută un pliant despre călătorii.
translations.cs: Moje máma hledá brožuru o cestování.
translations.da: Min mor leder efter en brochure om rejser.
translations.ja: 母は旅行のパンフレットを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of ‘sucht’.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of ‘sucht’.
Preposition meaning ‘about’, governing accusative; introduces a PP modifying ‘Broschüre’ (topic).
Common noun, plural accusative; object of the preposition ‘über’.

sentences.target: Er zeigt mir die Broschüre zur Ausstellung.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯kt miːɐ̯ diː bʁoˈʃyːʁə tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʊ̯sʃtɛlʊŋ/

translations.de: Er zeigt mir die Broschüre zur Ausstellung.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯kt miːɐ̯ diː bʁoˈʃyːʁə tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʊ̯sʃtɛlʊŋ/
translations.en: He is showing me the brochure for the exhibition.
translations.es: Me muestra el folleto de la exposición.
translations.fr: Il me montre le dépliant de l’exposition.
translations.zh-Hans: 他给我看展览的宣传册。
translations.yue: 佢畀我睇個展覽嘅小冊子。
translations.pt: Ele está me mostrando o folheto da exposição.
translations.he: הוא מראה לי את החוברת של התערוכה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cho tôi xem tờ giới thiệu của buổi triển lãm.
translations.nl: Hij laat me de folder van de tentoonstelling zien.
translations.hi: वह मुझे प्रदर्शनी का ब्रॉशर दिखा रहा है.
translations.el: Μου δείχνει το φυλλάδιο της έκθεσης.
translations.nb: Han viser meg brosjyren for utstillingen.
translations.id: Dia menunjukkan brosur pameran itu kepada saya.
translations.sv: Han visar mig broschyren för utställningen.
translations.da: Han viser mig brochuren til udstillingen.
translations.ja: 彼は展示会のパンフレットを見せてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, masculine singular nominative; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; ditransitive, taking a dative indirect object and an accusative direct object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object (recipient).
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of ‘zeigt’.
Contracted preposition ‘zu der’; governs dative; introduces a PP relating the brochure to the exhibition (destination/purpose).
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition ‘zur’.
